name: Fountaine Pajot SA
summary: Fountaine Pajot SA produces and sells cruising catamarans worldwide. It offers sailing catamarans under the Catamaran Lucia 40, Catamaran Astrea 42, Catamaran Helia 44 Evolution, Catamaran Saona 47, Catamaran Saba 50, Catamaran Ipanema 58, and Catamaran New 67 brands; and motor yachts under the Catamaran Motor Yacht 37, Catamaran Motor Yacht MY 40, and Catamaran Motor Yacht MY 44 brands. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Aigrefeuille-d'Aunis, France. Fountaine Pajot SA is a subsidiary of La Compagnie Du Catamaran SAS.
